rationale: TEXT/REGISTRY-ONLY -> JUDGE REFUSES (DETERMINISTIC, PRE-LLM): the committed runtime_emit_event_class='phantom_textonly.never.emitted.anywhere.zzz' is NEVER emitted in any sink and has NO same-namespace runtime activity, so the EXECUTION path is inconclusive and hands off to the judge fallback. The only resolvable 'evidence' is the retroactive_scan registry JSON itself -- a forbidden-substitution artifact (registry/spec-text, HC #72). The anti-substitution gate REFUSES PRE-LLM (no model call, fully deterministic): fidelity_ok=false, sub_checks.anti_substitution_refusal=true, llm_verdict=null, structural_verdict=null, crosscheck_agreement=null. The judge CANNOT pass its own self-test by reading the spec/registry text alone. This is the KT-8 / lone-oracle negative test: a substitution-prone judge would accept registry-state as evidence; the correctly-grounded probe refuses.
